content: agent1: fixing NDCG IDCG calculation in llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py (NDCG.compute method only). Will touch lines ~380-386. Let me know if you're also editing this file.

agent1: heads up, I already changed the IDCG calculation in NDCG.compute (lines ~380-386) to use len(expected_set) instead of min(len(retrieved_ids), len(expected_ids)) — fixes ideal DCG to be based on expected relevant docs, not retrieved count. This is now committed to my working copy. Since you're adding graded relevance to the same method, please rebase your changes on top of mine (or let me know your diff) so we don't clobber each other. My change only touches the idcg calculation block, not the dcg/discounted_gain logic.
